docs.text: Awesome Bayes A curated list of awesome Bayesian statistics blogs and resources. The resources may not be explicitly Bayesian-focused, but you should have a high probability of finding a Bayesian post. Recent posts are provided for (almost) every resource to indicate the likelihood the author is still writing Bayesian posts. Inspired by awesome-python . Awesome Bayes Blogs Podcasts Contributing Blogs A. Solomon Kurz Author: A. Solomon Kurz Recent Post: Notes on the Bayesian cumulative probit (December 30, 2021) Andreas Handel Author: Andreas Handel Recent Post: Bayesian analysis of longitudinal multilevel data using brms and rethinking - part 4 (May 13, 2022) Andrew Heiss Author: Andrew Heiss Recent Post: A guide to modeling outcomes that have lots of zeros with Bayesian hurdle lognormal and hurdle Gaussian regression models (May 9, 2022) Austin Rochford Author: Austin Rochford Recent Post: A Modern Introduction to Probabilistic Programming with PyMC (January 29, 2022) Bayesian Spectacles Recent Post: From p-values to Bayes Factors with 3p√n (February 22, 2022) BetanAlpha Author: Michael Betancourt Recent Post: Bridge Over Troubled Processes (May 2022) Chris Stucchio Author: Chris Stucchio Recent Post: Calibrating a classifier when the base rate changes (July 7, 2020) Colin Carroll Author: Colin Carroll Recent Post: Highlights of PyMC3 v3.8 (November 29, 2019) Computational Behavior Lab Author: Christian Luhmann Recent Post: Coordinates in PyMC & InferenceData Objects (June 4, 2022) Count Bayesie Author: Will Kurt Recent Post: How to Read the News like a Bayesian (February 19, 2022) Desi R. Ivanova Author: Desi R. Ivanova Recent Post: Introduction to Bayesian Optimal Experimental Design (September 25, 2018) Daniel Hadley Author: Daniel Hadley Recent Post: Empirical Bayes to Estimate NBA Treys (September 25, 2018) Doing Bayesian Data Analysis Author: John K. Kruschke Recent Post: A novel trend model made possible by Bayesian software (February 15, 2022) Elements of Evolutionary Anthropology Author: Richard McElreath Recent Post: Algebra and the Missing Oxen (January 29, 2018) George Ho Author: George Ho Recent Post: littlemcmc — A Standalone HMC and NUTS Sampler in Python (October 6, 2020) Eric J. Ma's Personal Site Author: Eric J. Ma Recent Post: Probability Simplex (May 5, 2021) Ethan Rosenthal Author: Ethan Rosenthal Recent Post: Bayesian Rock Climbing Rankings (April 4, 2022) The Etz-Files Author: Alex Etz Recent Post: A quick comment on recent BF (vs p-value) error control blog posts (July 20, 2016) Henrik Singmann - Computational Psychology Author: Henrik Singmann Recent Post: Diffusion/Wiener Model Analysis with brms – Part III: Hypothesis Tests of Parameter Estimates (September 6, 2018) Higher Order Functions Author: Tristan Mahr Recent Post: Random effects and penalized splines are the same thing (February 26, 2021) John D. Cook Author: John D. Cook Recent Post: A Bayesian approach to pricing (February 12, 2022) Joshua Cook Author: Joshua Cook Recent Post: Experimenting with multi-level and hierarchical splines in PyMC (February 28, 2022) mages' blog Author: Markus Gesmann Recent Post: Prediction for the 100m final at the Tokyo Olympics (July 29, 2021) Karin Knudson Author: Karin Knudson Recent Post: Expectation Maximization (EM) (July 31, 2020) Matthew Kay Author: Matthew Kay Recent Post: Announcing tidybayes + ggdist 3.0 (July 15, 2021) Michael Clark Author: Michael Clark Recent Post: Practical Bayes Part II (February 27, 2021) Neuroscience, Stats, and Coding Author: Jonas Kristoffer Lindeløv Recent Post: New tutorial on optimal decisions using Utility Theory (May 28, 2019) Oriol Unraveled Author: Oriol Abril Pla Recent Post: PyMC 4.0 with Labeled Coords and Dims (June 7, 2022) Ph.Demetri Author: Demetri Pananos Recent Post: Flippin’ Fun! (May 7, 2022) Probably Overthinking It Author: Allen Downey Recent Post: Emitter Detector Redux (September 5, 2021) Publishable Stuff Author: Rasmus Bååth Recent Post: Yet another visualization of the Bayesian Beta-Binomial model (December 13, 2018) PyMC Blog PyMC Examples PyMC Labs Recent Post: What if? Causal inference through counterfactual reasoning in PyMC (July 13, 2022) Pythonic Perambulations Author: Jake VanderPlas Recent Post: Frequentism and Bayesianism V: Model Selection (August 7, 2015) Robert Grant - stats Author: Robert Grant Recent Post: How (not) to introduce newcomers to Bayesian analysis (2018) Dr. Robert Kübler Author: Dr. Robert Kübler Recent Post: Bayesian Marketing Mix Modeling in Python via PyMC3 (December 30, 2021) Sometimes | R Author: Matti Vuorre Recent Post: How to calculate contrasts from a fitted brms model (February 5, 2020) Stan Case Studies Recent Post: Bayesian Latent Class Models and Handling of Label Switching (June 26, 2021) Statistical Modeling, Causal Inference, and Social Science Authors: Andrew Gelman and others Recent Post: Bayes factors measure prior predictive performance (June 25, 2022) Statistical Thinking Author: Frank Harrell Recent Post: Bayesian Methods to Address Clinical Development Challenges for COVID-19 Drugs and Biologics (September 15, 2020) Steven V. Miller Author: Steven V. Miller Recent Post: How Should You Think About Your Priors for a Bayesian Analysis? (February 8, 2021) Susan Li Author: Susan Li Recent Post: Forecasting the 2020 US Election Using Multilevel Regression with Post-stratification (July 17, 2021) Tomás Capretto Author: Tomás Capretto Recent Post: Hierarchical modeling with the LKJ prior in PyMC (July 12, 2022) Un garçon pas comme les autres (Bayes) Author: Dan Simpson Recent Post: The linear algebra of linear mixed effects models and their generalisations (March 21, 2022) Variance Explained Author: David Robinson Recent Post: Simulation of empirical Bayesian methods (using baseball statistics) (January 11, 2017) While My MCMC Gently Samples Author: Thomas Wiecki Recent Post: Using Bayesian Decision Making to Optimize Supply Chains (January 14, 2019) Xi'an's 'Og Author: Christian P. Robert Recent Post: nonparametric ABC [seminar] (June 3, 2022) Podcasts The Bayes Factor Host: Human Interaction Laboratory @ Tufts University Recent Episode: Michael Lee (January 4, 2021) Data Skeptic Host: Kyle Polich Recent Episode: Uncertainty Representations (with Jessica Hullman) (April 4, 2020) Learning Bayesian Statistics Host: Alexandre Andorra Recent Episode: #63 Media Mix Models & Bayes for Marketing, with Luciano Paz (June 28, 2022) The Local Maximum Host: Max Sklar Recent Episode: Episode 229 - Fun with Bayesian Statistics with Will Kurt (June 6, 2022) Contributing Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first.
